headline: Phillips 66 Appoints Greg Hayes as Lead Independent Director
summary: HOUSTON, May 13, 2026--Phillips 66 today announced that the Board of Directors has appointed Greg Hayes to serve as lead independent director, effective immediately.

headline: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) Combines Strong Earnings Momentum with a Perfect Technical Setup
summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) shows strong earnings momentum with 138% EPS growth, a perfect technical rating of 10, and a setup score of 8, making it a compelling candidate for growth-oriented traders seeking a high-conviction entry.
